---
title: "Essays & Field Notes"
subtitle: "Research translation, technical notes, and practical writing from health data work"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: 
    - "../posts/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
  max-items: 100
  feed: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="blog-page">
  <section class="blog-command-deck">
    <div class="blog-command-copy">
      <span class="section-eyebrow">Writing</span>
      <p class="blog-overline">Research translation · Methods · Career · Field systems</p>
      <h1 class="blog-command-title">A writing studio for public-health research, analytics practice, and the work around the work.</h1>
      <p class="blog-command-lead">Use the explorer to move between research essays, technical notes, career strategy, and field systems writing. The goal is not volume. It is clarity, usefulness, and work that feels grounded in practice.</p>
      <div class="blog-hero-actions">
        <a href="../posts/47-facility-decision-space-chronic-care/index.html" class="btn-solid">Read the flagship essay</a>
        <a href="../research/publications.html" class="btn-ghost">Explore research</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="blog-command-aside" aria-label="Writing overview">
      <article class="blog-aside-card">
        <p class="blog-kicker">Flagship essay</p>
        <h3>When Clinics Can Diagnose but Cannot Buy Medicines</h3>
        <p>The public essay built from the BMC Public Health paper and written for readers beyond academic journals.</p>
        <a href="../posts/47-facility-decision-space-chronic-care/index.html">Open essay →</a>
      </article>

      <article class="blog-aside-card blog-aside-metric">
        <span class="blog-metric-value">50+</span>
        <span class="blog-metric-label">Posts across analytics, health research, career development, and monitoring systems</span>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="blog-explorer-shell">
    <div class="blog-filter-bar" role="tablist" aria-label="Blog streams">
      <button class="blog-filter-btn active" data-filter="all" type="button">All writing</button>
      <button class="blog-filter-btn" data-filter="research" type="button">Research</button>
      <button class="blog-filter-btn" data-filter="technical" type="button">Technical</button>
      <button class="blog-filter-btn" data-filter="career" type="button">Career</button>
      <button class="blog-filter-btn" data-filter="field" type="button">Field systems</button>
    </div>
    <div class="blog-filter-status">
      <p id="blogFilterLabel">Showing all writing</p>
      <p id="blogFilterCount">Use the filters to reshape the archive.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="blog-feature-grid">
    <article class="blog-story-card blog-story-primary">
      <p class="blog-story-kicker">Research spotlight</p>
      <h2>When Clinics Can Diagnose but Cannot Buy Medicines</h2>
      <p>This essay translates the forthcoming BMC Public Health paper into a sharper public argument about budgets, approvals, and why chronic care fails before treatment ever starts.</p>
      <div class="blog-story-tags">
        <span class="blog-story-tag">BMC Public Health</span>
        <span class="blog-story-tag">Health financing</span>
        <span class="blog-story-tag">NCD care</span>
      </div>
      <a href="../posts/47-facility-decision-space-chronic-care/index.html" class="btn-solid">Open essay</a>
    </article>

    <div class="blog-side-stack">
      <a class="blog-story-card blog-story-secondary" href="../posts/22-reproducible-research-public-health/index.html">
        <p class="blog-story-kicker">Research methods</p>
        <h3>Why reproducible research matters in public health</h3>
        <p>Transparent workflows, better trust, and why method discipline is not optional in health science.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="blog-story-card blog-story-secondary" href="../posts/30-health-financial-diaries-explainer/index.html">
        <p class="blog-story-kicker">Health economics</p>
        <h3>Health financial diaries</h3>
        <p>How high-frequency financial data reveals what conventional surveys miss about care-seeking and coping.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="blog-story-card blog-story-secondary" href="../posts/23-r-for-health-researchers/index.html">
        <p class="blog-story-kicker">Technical writing</p>
        <h3>R for health researchers</h3>
        <p>A practical bridge between analysis, reporting, and reproducible public-health workflows.</p>
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const filterButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.blog-filter-btn'));
  const filterLabel = document.getElementById('blogFilterLabel');
  const filterCount = document.getElementById('blogFilterCount');

  const streamNames = {
    all: 'all writing',
    research: 'research writing',
    technical: 'technical writing',
    career: 'career writing',
    field: 'field systems writing'
  };

  const rules = [
    { key: 'career', words: ['career', 'portfolio', 'job search', 'interview', 'salary', 'remote work', 'linkedin', 'personal brand', 'first job', 'roadmap'] },
    { key: 'field', words: ['monitoring & evaluation', 'impact evaluation', 'survey design', 'data collection', 'field work', 'm&e', 'logframe', 'odk', 'mobile technology', 'data quality', 'health programs'] },
    { key: 'research', words: ['public health', 'health financing', 'health systems', 'health research', 'research methods', 'cancer research', 'health economics', 'ncd', 'kenya', 'reproducibility'] },
    { key: 'technical', words: ['r', 'python', 'sql', 'quarto', 'dashboards', 'dashboard', 'tableau', 'power bi', 'data engineering', 'data visualization', 'git', 'github', 'database', 'tools', 'automation'] }
  ];

  function detectStream(card) {
    const text = [
      ...Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('.listing-category')).map((node) => node.textContent || ''),
      card.querySelector('.listing-title')?.textContent || '',
      card.querySelector('.listing-subtitle')?.textContent || ''
    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

    for (const rule of rules) {
      if (rule.words.some((word) => text.includes(word))) {
        return rule.key;
      }
    }
    return 'technical';
  }

  function decorateCards() {
    const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#listing-listing .quarto-post'));
    cards.forEach((card) => {
      const stream = detectStream(card);
      card.dataset.stream = stream;

      const body = card.querySelector('.body');
      if (body && !body.querySelector('.blog-stream-badge')) {
        const badge = document.createElement('span');
        badge.className = 'blog-stream-badge';
        badge.textContent = streamNames[stream];
        body.prepend(badge);
      }
    });
    return cards;
  }

  function applyFilter(stream) {
    const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#listing-listing .quarto-post'));
    let visible = 0;

    cards.forEach((card) => {
      const show = stream === 'all' || card.dataset.stream === stream;
      card.classList.toggle('blog-post-hidden', !show);
      if (show) visible += 1;
    });

    filterButtons.forEach((button) => {
      button.classList.toggle('active', button.dataset.filter === stream);
    });

    if (filterLabel) {
      filterLabel.textContent = stream === 'all'
        ? 'Showing all writing'
        : `Showing ${streamNames[stream]}`;
    }

    if (filterCount) {
      filterCount.textContent = `${visible} posts visible`;
    }
  }

  function init() {
    const cards = decorateCards();
    if (!cards.length) return;

    filterButtons.forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener('click', () => applyFilter(button.dataset.filter || 'all'));
    });

    applyFilter('all');
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init, { once: true });
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();
</script>
```

## Archive

Recent essays and tutorials, sorted from newest to oldest.
